reviews.name: Michael Martinko
reviews.text: The owner at Sal's made this experience seamless. He answered my call on the 1st attempt. Asked all the right questions and delivered exactly what we discussed.

reviews.name: Venus Vargas
reviews.text: Timely, professional and reliable. Definitely would recommend and will be using this service again in the near future!

reviews.name: G Storm Sanks
reviews.text: From the very first text to the end of the job, Sal and team was very professional and did a great job. Sal offered thoughtful color advice and the finish looked clean.

reviews.name: carla majano
reviews.text: Sal was absolutely amazing, extremely professional. We contacted him to paint an office for us, he was able to meet our timeline and the walls looked brand new.

reviews.name: laura martinko
reviews.text: Mr. Sal did a beautiful job painting all my bedrooms! He was extremely professional and his prices were fantastic! I recommend him to all my friends now!!
